The '''''Taanab Sunrise''''' was a [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] that was part of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|Defense Fleet]] as of [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]]. That [[Standard year/Legends|year]], as part of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], it [[Space warfare/Legends|fought]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]] forces [[Battle of Garqi|over]] the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Garqi/Legends|Garqi]]. There, it was severely damaged as it provided the New Republic forces with the [[Time/Legends|time]] to extract intelligence operatives off Garqi, and was only saved thanks to the intervention of the [[Imperial Remnant]] [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] ''[[Red Harvest]]''.

==Description==
The ''Taanab Sunrise'' was a [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]]<ref name="Tide" /> measuring 900 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] in length.<ref name="SOTG01" /> It was armed with [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] [[Cannon/Legends|cannons]] and [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missiles]], and had both a [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|deflector shield generator]] and a [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] enabled.<ref name="Tide" />

==History==
The ''Taanab Sunrise'' was part of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|Defense Fleet]]<ref name="Tide" /> in the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]],<ref name="Date">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide II: Ruin]]'' to [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]].</ref> and was named after [[Taanab/Legends|Taanab]],<ref name="Tide" /> an [[Agriworld/Legends|agriworld]].<ref name="Atlas">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> The [[Starship/Legends|ship]] participated in a New Republic [[Battle of Garqi|strike]] to extract intelligence operatives off the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]–occupied<ref name="Tide" /> [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]<ref name="Geo">''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]''</ref> [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Garqi/Legends|Garqi]] that year during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], fought mainly between the New Republic and the [[Extragalactic/Legends|extra-galactic]] Yuuzhan Vong. Arriving later in the battle over Garqi to reinforce the ''[[Ralroost]]'', a [[Bothan Assault Cruiser]], in retrieving the operatives from the planet via the [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] [[Best Chance (shuttle)|''Best Chance'']], the ''Taanab Sunrise'' and [[Unidentified Victory-class Star Destroyer|another]] ''Victory''-class [[Space warfare/Legends|attacked]] the Yuuzhan Vong [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]], led by the invaders' [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] ''[[Burning Pride]]''.<ref name="Tide" />

The purpose of the pair of ''Victory''-class cruisers was to buy [[Time/Legends|time]] for the operatives to board the ''Ralroost''. However, the ''Taanab Sunrise'' was targeted by the majority of the enemy ships, and its shields collapsed under the Yuuzhan Vong's fire. Just then, a [[Hammer Group|strike force]] led by the [[Imperial Remnant]]'s [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]] arrived in the [[Star system/Legends|star system]] to assist the New Republic forces. The Imperial [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] ''[[Red Harvest]]'' put itself between the ''Taanab Sunrise'', whose [[Hull/Legends|hull]] was severely damaged, and the enemy to save the ship by taking their fire instead. The New Republic and Imperial Remnant forces then withdrew as the operatives made it to the ''Ralroost''.<ref name="Tide" />

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Taanab Sunrise'' first appeared in [[2000]]'s novel ''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide II: Ruin]]'', written by [[Michael A. Stackpole]] as part of [[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order|''The New Jedi Order'']]{{'s}} [[Dark Tide duology|''Dark Tide Duology'']].<ref name="Tide" />
